title: wholesome tunisian flour bake
description: a light and airy yeast-based bread originating from tunisia, perfect for weeknight meals
instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine warm water and yeast, and let it sit for 5 minutes
add flour, salt, and olive oil to the bowl, and mix until a shaggy dough forms
knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic
place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour
preheat the oven to 375 fahrenheit (190 celsius)
punch down the dough, shape it into a round loaf, and place it on a baking sheet
brush the top with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds, black pepper, and garlic powder
bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through
let the bread cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing
